customers.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this customer?

parts.searchPlaceholder: Search by part number or description...

purchases.confirmDeleteVendor: Are you sure you want to delete this vendor?

currency.dualCurrencyDescription: Display prices in a secondary currency alongside your primary currency.

tecdoc.noResults: No parts found for this vehicle

mpesa.title: M-Pesa Payment
mpesa.notConfigured: M-Pesa is not configured. Contact admin to set up API keys.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure which WhatsApp notifications are sent to customers automatically.
notifications.toggleNote: Toggle settings are display-only for now. Notifications are always sent when WhatsApp is configured.

amc.title: AMC Packages
amc.servicesPlaceholder: Oil change, Brake check, Filter replacement (comma-separated)

marketing.title: Marketing Campaigns
marketing.scheduleNote: Leave empty to save as draft
marketing.confirmSendMessage: This will send the WhatsApp message to all recipients. This action cannot be undone.

ai.notConfigured: AI is not configured. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to enable.

aida.pageSubtitle: Capture vehicle damage and let Claude draft panel-level findings and operations for the estimator to review.
aida.reanalyseConfirm: Re-analyse with AI? Existing model-sourced findings and operations will be replaced. Manual edits are preserved.
aida.createJobConfirm: Create a new body-repair job card for {plate} and push {count} operation(s)?
aida.createJobNeedsOperations: Add at least one operation (or run Analyse with AI) first
aida.createJobTooltip: Creates a body-repair job card and pushes operations as lines
aida.pdfTooltip: Generate a PDF summary of this assessment
aida.confidenceUnsure: AI unsure — please verify this finding
aida.overrideTooltip: Model output edited by an estimator
aida.monthlyCapHelp: Maximum AI damage-analyses per month for this workshop. Protects against runaway Claude vision costs. Default 200. Re-analyses each count once. Usage and remaining quota visible on the AIDA page.
aida.editHistorySubtitle: Every correction an estimator makes to a finding or operation is logged here. Model-sourced rows stay traceable.
aida.editHistoryCount: {count, plural, =0 {No edits yet} =1 {1 edit} other {# edits}}
aida.captureLinkTooltip: Generate a shareable link so the customer can upload damage photos from their phone
aida.captureLinkCopied: Link copied — share it via WhatsApp / SMS / email
aida.captureLinkNoUrl: Set PUBLIC_APP_URL on the API to enable capture links

vehicleHistory.tabSubtitle: Every job card, cost, and part installed on this vehicle.
vehicleHistory.modalSubtitle: What this vehicle has been through on your watch.
vehicleHistory.empty: No service history yet for this vehicle.

jobCard.bodyStagesSubtitle: Physical workflow stages. Informational — does not block status transitions.

settings.pageSubtitle: Configure your workshop, operational policies, billing, team, and customer communication.
settings.groupBillingDesc: VAT, pricing, AGT e-invoicing, ERP integration, and repair catalog.
settings.workshopInfoDesc: Shown on invoices, estimates, and public portals.
settings.languageDesc: Language used across the application for the current user.
settings.workshopDefaultsDesc: Values the system falls back to when no specific setting exists on a job, PO, or customer.
settings.defaultLabourRateHelp: Used when approving an AIDA damage assessment or adding labour with no prior line on the job. Falls through to the last labour rate on the job, then to the highest technician hourly_rate, then to 0.
settings.autoApproveThresholdHelp: Technician parts requests with an estimated cost below this threshold are approved automatically. Above it, a manager must confirm (WhatsApp flow). Leave blank to require approval on every PO.
settings.loyaltyPointsHelp: How many points a customer earns per 1 {currency} spent on a paid invoice. Example: 0.01 = 1 point per 100 {currency}.
settings.photoPolicyDesc: Control when walk-around photos are required during job card creation.
settings.photoPolicyStrictDesc: The wizard pauses at the Photos step. The advisor can upload directly or send a WhatsApp link to capture from a phone. Continues only after 4+ photos are received.
settings.photoPolicyFlexibleDesc: The wizard allows skipping photos with a warning. Photos can be added from the job detail page. The job cannot be closed until at least 4 photos are uploaded.
settings.stockPolicyDesc: Control who can use parts when stock is insufficient. By default the system blocks and only the Owner can override.
settings.allowNegativeStockHelp: If on, any user can add parts even when stock is 0. Not recommended. Leave off to restrict by role.
settings.overrideRoles: Roles allowed to override stock check
settings.overrideRolesHelp: Users with these roles can use parts with insufficient stock (stock goes negative, audit logged).
settings.costMethodDesc: How the cost price of parts is calculated when receiving goods
settings.costMethodLastHelp: Uses the most recent purchase price. Simple, common for small workshops.
settings.costMethodWacHelp: Blends old and new costs proportionally. Best for stable pricing.
settings.costMethodFifoHelp: Uses the oldest batch cost first. Required by some ERP/accounting standards.
settings.tileCatalogDesc: Maintenance packages, standard repairs, and quick-access items.
settings.tileTaxCodesDesc: VAT classifications for parts, services, and invoicing.
settings.tilePricingDesc: Pricing mode, price groups, and category markup rules.
settings.tileAgtDesc: Document series, hash chain, RSA keys, and SAF-T (AO) export.
settings.tileErpDesc: Primavera V10 connection, document series, tax and article mappings.
settings.tileBranchesDesc: Physical locations — customers and parts master shared, stock tracked per warehouse.
settings.tileWebhooksDesc: HTTP callbacks for job, estimate, invoice, and customer events.
settings.tileAuditLogDesc: Who changed what, and when — append-only record of settings, credit notes, branches, stock transfers.
settings.tileUsersDesc: Invite, list, and change roles of this workshop's users.
settings.reviewsDesc: Customers who rate NPS 9–10 automatically receive a WhatsApp 24 h later with the review link. Detractors and passives are not prompted.
settings.aidaMonthlyCapHelp: Maximum number of AIDA analyses per month before manual confirmation is required.
settings.usersDesc: Manage the team for this workshop. Users are always bound to the workshop (tenant). Only Owner and Manager can invite.
settings.roleHelpOwner: Full access, including billing and critical settings.
settings.roleHelpManager: Operational management: jobs, parts, invites, reports.
settings.roleHelpReceptionist: Front desk: customers, jobs, estimates, collections.
settings.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this user? They will not be able to log in until reactivated.
settings.permissionsMatrixDesc: Current capabilities per role. Granular per-user permissions require evolving the RBAC model.
settings.rbacDynamicPlannedDesc: The schema for fully editable roles is already in the database (capabilities, custom_roles, role_permissions tables). Migrating the backend controllers to the new model will happen module-by-module — until then, the 4 roles above are the only valid ones.
settings.customRolesDesc: Create roles tailored to your workshop, granting exactly the capabilities each job needs. The 4 system roles (Owner, Manager, Receptionist, Technician) are predefined and cannot be edited.
settings.roleKeyHelp: Unique identifier (lowercase letters, numbers, underscores). Cannot be changed after creation.
settings.roleCapabilitiesHelp: Check the actions users with this role can perform.
settings.deleteRoleConfirm: Delete this role? This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteRoleInUse: Cannot delete — users are still assigned to this role. Reassign them first.

settingsPricing.title: Pricing & loyalty
settingsPricing.description: Pricing modes, price groups, markup rules by category, and the customer loyalty program.

settingsTaxCodes.title: Tax codes (VAT)
settingsTaxCodes.description: VAT classifications used across parts, services and invoicing. Set the default code new items inherit; mark a code inactive to hide it without losing history.

settingsCatalog.title: Repair catalog
settingsCatalog.description: Standard repair packages and quick-access items used when creating job cards and estimates.

settingsAgt.title: AGT — Electronic invoicing
settingsAgt.description: Angolan tax authority e-invoicing: environment, software certificate, RSA key pair, taxpayer NIF and document series.

settingsErp.title: ERP — Primavera V10
settingsErp.description: Export invoices, credit notes and payments to your Primavera V10 installation.

settingsWebhooks.title: Webhooks
settingsWebhooks.description: HTTP callbacks for job, invoice, customer and estimate events. Each request carries an X-Mecanix-Signature header with the HMAC-SHA256 of the body signed by your secret.

settingsWorkshop.title: Workshop profile
settingsWorkshop.description: Identity, contacts, language and currencies for your workshop. These appear on invoices, estimates and customer communications.
settingsWorkshop.identityDescription: Public information shown on documents and portals.
settingsWorkshop.fieldNameHelp: Shown on invoices, estimates and public pages.
settingsWorkshop.fieldEmailHelp: For customer replies and copies of sent documents.
settingsWorkshop.fieldPhoneHelp: Include the international code (e.g. +244). Shown on documents.
settingsWorkshop.fieldAddressHelp: Full workshop address as it should appear on invoices.
settingsWorkshop.fieldTaxIdHelp: Company tax identification number. Required for e-invoicing.
settingsWorkshop.localeDescription: Language applies to your session. Country and primary currency are set when the workshop is created.
settingsWorkshop.fieldLanguageHelp: App language for the current user.
settingsWorkshop.fieldCountryHelp: Set when the workshop was created. Contact support to change.
settingsWorkshop.fieldPrimaryCurrencyHelp: Currency for prices, invoices and reports.
settingsWorkshop.secondaryCurrencyDescription: Display prices in a secondary currency next to the primary one. Used in Angola for AOA + USD.
settingsWorkshop.fieldSecondaryCurrencyHelp: Choose 'None' to hide the secondary currency.
settingsWorkshop.fieldExchangeRateHelp: How many {primary} equal 1 {secondary}. Update whenever needed.

settingsFinancial.title: Financial settings
settingsFinancial.description: Tax rates, valuation methods and approval thresholds.
settingsFinancial.taxRateDescription: Applied automatically to invoices and estimates unless the item's tax code overrides it.
settingsFinancial.taxRateHelp: Default percentage applied to invoices. In Angola the general rate is 14%.
settingsFinancial.costMethodDescription: How the unit cost of parts is calculated as purchases enter the warehouse.
settingsFinancial.costMethodHelp: Applied whenever supplier goods are received. Choose FIFO if your ERP requires it.
settingsFinancial.costMethod_last_cost_help: Uses the most recent purchase price. Simple; common for small workshops.
settingsFinancial.costMethod_weighted_average_help: Blends old and new costs proportionally. Ideal when prices are stable.
settingsFinancial.costMethod_fifo_help: Consumes the oldest batches first. Required by some accounting standards.
settingsFinancial.labourRateDescription: Hourly value used when a job card is created and no technician rate is available.
settingsFinancial.labourRateHelp: Used when approving an AIDA assessment or adding labour without a prior line.
settingsFinancial.autoApproveDescription: Parts requests below this amount are approved automatically. Above it, a manager must confirm (via WhatsApp).
settingsFinancial.autoApproveHelp: Requests below this cost are fast-tracked without manual approval.
settingsFinancial.autoApproveHint: Leave empty to require approval on every request.
settingsFinancial.taxCodesLinkDescription: Tax classifications per item or service type, for AGT e-invoicing.
settingsFinancial.comingSoonDescription: This section is being reorganised. In the meantime, edit these settings on

settingsAida.title: Damage assessments (AIDA)
settingsAida.description: Configuration for the AI damage-assessment module: monthly cap, body and paint rates, plus quick links to insurers and claims.
settingsAida.capDescription: Guards against runaway Claude vision costs. Once the cap is reached, new analyses ask for manual confirmation.
settingsAida.capHelp: Default 200. Re-analyses count once each. Applies only to AI-powered assessments — manual assessments are unlimited.
settingsAida.bodyLabourDescription: Hourly rate used when the AI generates body-repair operations (repair, replace, R&I). Overrides the general labour rate for body work.
settingsAida.bodyLabourHelp: Leave blank to use the workshop's general labour rate. Useful when body work is priced separately from mechanical.
settingsAida.paintDescription: Estimated paint and primer cost per panel. Applied to paint / refinish operations the AI generates.
settingsAida.paintHelp: Average estimate. Includes primer, base coat, clear coat and ancillaries. Adjust per estimate when needed.
settingsAida.insurersDescription: Create and edit the insurers your workshop works with. Assessments can be linked to an insurer instead of a job card.
settingsAida.claimsDescription: Browse and manage open claims. An assessment can be linked to an existing claim or converted into a job card.
settingsAida.modelNote: Used for damage-photo analysis. API key is set on the server — no action needed.

aidaNew.title: New damage assessment
aidaNew.subtitle: Pick the vehicle to inspect. You can run an assessment for an insurance company without opening a job card — the job card can be created later from the assessment.
aidaNew.searchPlaceholder: Search by plate, make or model…
aidaNew.typeToSearch: Start typing to find a vehicle.
aidaNew.noMatches: No results for "{search}". Create the vehicle first under Vehicles → New vehicle.
aidaNew.note: This assessment is tied to the vehicle. You can link it to a claim or convert it into a job card later from the assessment page.
aidaNew.emptyDescription: Click “New assessment” to start — you can also begin one from a job card or vehicle page.

settingsNumbering.title: Document numbering
settingsNumbering.description: Format, prefixes and yearly reset for every document the system generates.
settingsNumbering.fiscalLinkDescription: Invoices, credit notes, debit notes and receipts follow AGT rules. Configure them on the AGT integration page.
settingsNumbering.operationalDescription: Prefix, zero-padding, reset policy and format per document type. Changes apply from the next issued number onwards.
settingsNumbering.yearFormatHelp: Include the current year as part of the number. Common with yearly resets.
settingsNumbering.safetyNote: Numbers already issued never change. Edits here affect only future documents. Counter and history are immutable for audit purposes.

settingsIntegrations.title: Integrations
settingsIntegrations.description: External systems your workshop talks to.
settingsIntegrations.agtDescription: Environment, software certificate, taxpayer NIF and document series for Angola.
settingsIntegrations.erpDescription: ERP connection, account mapping and automatic document export.
settingsIntegrations.webhooksDescription: HTTP notifications for job, invoice, customer and estimate events.

settingsOperational.title: Operational policies
settingsOperational.description: How job cards, photos, stock and AIDA behave in your workshop.
settingsOperational.photoPolicyDescription: Whether photos are required when creating a job card.
settingsOperational.photoPolicyHelp: Controls whether a job can be opened without uploading inspection photos first.
settingsOperational.photoPolicy_strict_help: The wizard stops at the Photos step. Minimum 4 photos before proceeding.
settingsOperational.photoPolicy_flexible_help: Allows skipping with a warning. The job cannot be closed without at least 4 photos.
settingsOperational.stockPolicyDescription: Who can issue parts when stock is insufficient.
settingsOperational.allowNegativeHelp: If on, any user can issue parts even when stock is zero. Not recommended.
settingsOperational.allowNegativeToggleHelp: When on, the role restrictions below are ignored.
settingsOperational.overrideRolesHelp: Roles that may issue parts without sufficient stock. The movement goes negative and is audit-logged.
settingsOperational.aidaCapDescription: Guards against excessive AI damage-assessment costs.
settingsOperational.aidaCapHelp: When the cap is reached, the system requires manual confirmation. Default: 200. Re-analyses count once each.
settingsOperational.reviewsDescription: Customers with NPS 9–10 automatically receive a WhatsApp message 24 h later with this review link.
settingsOperational.reviewsHelp: Paste the link Google provides in your Business Profile dashboard.
settingsOperational.comingSoonDescription: This section is being reorganised. In the meantime, edit these settings on

settingsNotifications.title: Notifications & communication
settingsNotifications.description: Control which notifications go out to customers. The templates shown in preview are managed by the platform.
settingsNotifications.channelDescription: Turn each notification type on or off. Changes are saved automatically.
settingsNotifications.backendNote: Note: preferences save instantly. The notification sender will respect these settings once the next backend release ships.
settingsNotifications.comingSoonDescription: This section is being reorganised. In the meantime, edit these settings on

settingsPermissions.title: Permissions
settingsPermissions.description: Capability matrix by role. System roles are read-only; custom roles are edited on the Roles page.
settingsPermissions.matrixDescription: Each capability governs one action in the system (e.g. create invoice, void payment). A checkmark means the role is allowed to perform it.
settingsPermissions.editHint: To edit capabilities for a custom role, open

settingsLoyalty.title: Loyalty program
settingsLoyalty.description: Points accrual rate and tier thresholds. Active only when the loyalty module is enabled on customers.
settingsLoyalty.pointsPerCurrencyHelp: Points awarded for each unit of {currency} on a paid invoice.
settingsLoyalty.tierThresholdsHelp: Accumulated points needed to reach each tier. Customers move up when they cross the threshold.

settingsBranches.title: Branches
settingsBranches.description: Physical locations within your workshop. Customers, vehicles and the parts master are shared across branches; stock is tracked per warehouse.

settingsAudit.title: Audit log
settingsAudit.description: Append-only record of high-value mutations. Every settings change, credit note, branch change and stock transfer is captured here with the actor, timestamp and before/after snapshot when relevant.
